name: Jet-Long: Efficient Long-Context Extension with Dynamic Bifocal RoPE

four_principles_filter.去粗取精: 研讨厅按 intake_score≥0.6 + 子系统匹配入库
four_principles_filter.去伪存真: 代码级落地/规划态已在决策中标注
four_principles_filter.由表及里: 研讨厅驱动正式入库固化

digest_notes: Modern LLMs are increasingly deployed in long-context applications such as RAG and agentic workflows. We propose Jet-Long, a tuning-free zero-shot method that pairs a local RoPE-faithful window with a long-range window whose rescaling factor adapts dynamically to sequence length. On Qwen3 up to 128K context, Jet-Long leads RULER by +2.03 to +4.79pp, achieves best overall accuracy on HELMET-RAG. Effects are essentially free via a fused CuTe kernel.
